headline: Tesla Stock Falls as Investors Wait for Its New Robot, Optimus Version 3.0
summary: Tesla  stock fell with most stocks early Tuesday, as investors continued to worry about Middle East tensions.  Shares of the electric vehicle maker were down 2.4% at $393.64 in premarket trading, while  and  futures were both off about 1.7%.  Brent crude oil futures were up 6.2% to $80.87, re-igniting inflation fears.
